docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ROGER FAJARDO

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-25-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUD TO AUGUST 25, 2011 FOR OEX. DEFENDANT IS TO PRODUCE 3 MONTHS FINANCIAL RECORDS AND POSSIBLE BENCH LETTER. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE $50.00 PAYMENTS PER MONTH BEGINNING AUGUST 15, 2011 AND PAYABLE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT IS PAID. APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY DREISBACH, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-24-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-16-2011 (SERVICE FEE $55.00) AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DREISBACH, ERIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DREISBACH, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO, ROGER

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2011 IS CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-14-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. THE DEFENDANT IS TO PROVIDE 3 MONTHS WORTH OF FINANCIAL INFORMATION AS INDICATED ON THE SUBPOENA TO PRESENT TO THE CREDITOR AND/OR THE COURT FOR REVIEW. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-17-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED AND DEFENDANT DID NOT BRING IN HIS FINANCIALS. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT DEFENDANT MADE FIRST PAYMENT OF $50.00, AND IS WILLING TO ACCEPT MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $50.00 PER MONTH FROM DEFENDANT. IF NO APPEARANCES ON NOVEMBER 17, 2011 PROGRESS REPORT DATE, CONTINUE IN FOUR MONTH INTERVALS FOR PROGRESS REPORTS
